MWCapture SDK  3.3.1.1556

GetANCPacket C++

GetANCPacket illuminates how to get ANC(Ancillary).
Folder dir: SDKv3\Examples\Legacy_VC++\CmdTools\GetANCPacket

Supported Hardware

Products of Pro/Eco Capture Family which support the SDI signal

Features

  1. Extract Ancillary data (ANC data) from SDI signal, and save the data as a .bin file.
  2. Select the capture channel from multiple devices by specifying the command value.

Workflow

  1. To get device version, initialize and enumerate all available devices, call: MWGetVersion, MWCaptureInitInstance, MWGetChannelCount
  2. To find the valid capture card, call: MWGetChannelInfoByIndex, MWGetVideoInputSourceArray

  3. Conduct any of the following steps to open a channel:

    1. To open the specified channel according to the command parameter, call: MWOpenChannel;
    2. To open the first available channel by default when there is not a specified channel, call: MWGetDevicePath, MWOpenChannelByPath;
  4. To reset the ANC, call: MWCaptureSetSDIANCType
  5. To register for notifications, call:MWRegisterNotify
  6. To get ANC data packets triggered by the specified notifications, call: MWGetNotifyStatus, MWCaptureGetSDIANCPacket
  7. Save the data to a binary file.
  8. To free up system resources and memory, call: MWUnregisterNotify, MWCloseChannel, MWCaptureExitInstance

Result

GetANCPacket
